buildCommand: prisma generate && prisma db push --skip-generate && next build

headers.value: camera=(self), microphone=(self), display-capture=(self), geolocation=(), payment=(self), usb=()

default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://js.stripe.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https: wss: ws: https://*.vercel.app https://*.public.blob.vercel-storage.com https://api.anthropic.com https://api.groq.com https://api.stripe.com wss://*.vercel.app wss://*.livekit.cloud; frame-src https://js.stripe.com https://hooks.stripe.com https://checkout.stripe.com; media-src 'self' blob: data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';
